ddls:
CREATE TABLE "geospatial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the data point */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the data point */,
  "sine_time" REAL /* Sine of the time value */,
  "cose_time" REAL /* Cosine of the time value */,
  "org_lat" REAL /* Original latitude of the data point */,
  "org_lng" REAL /* Original longitude of the data point */,
  "org_sine_time" REAL /* Sine of the original time value */,
  "org_cose_time" REAL /* Cosine of the original time value */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data type */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "time_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time value */,
  "org_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organization */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the geospatial data */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Resolution of the data */,
  "data_size" INTEGER /* Size of the data in bytes */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_org_id FOREIGN KEY ("org_id") REFERENCES organizations ("org_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_time_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_id") REFERENCES time_values ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geospatial_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or endpoint for the data source */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last date the data source was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit_of_measurement" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the data is collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_values" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time value */,
  "time_value" REAL /* Time value */,
  "sine_time" REAL /* Sine of the time value */,
  "cose_time" REAL /* Cosine of the time value */,
  "time_unit" TEXT /* Unit of time */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the time value */,
  "timestamp_utc" TEXT /* Timestamp in UTC */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organizations" (
  "org_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organization */,
  "org_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the organization */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the primary contact person */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the primary contact person */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the organization */,
  "establishment_date" TEXT /* Date the organization was established */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("org_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user role */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES geospatial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being validated */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES geospatial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_encrypt" (
  "encrypt_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each encryption key */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being encrypted */,
  "encryption_key" TEXT /* Encryption key */,
  "encryption_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was encrypted */,
  "encryption_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for encryption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encrypt_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_encrypt_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES geospatial_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role with the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the permission is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_governance" (
  "governance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "policy_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy was last updated */,
  "responsible_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("governance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_governance_responsible_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("responsible_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "regulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the regulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the regulation */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date when the compliance was last checked */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Current compliance status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data affected */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES geospatial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
